name: China Universal Hang Seng Index Classified QDII
summary: China Universal Hang Seng Index Classified QDII is a fund that tracks the performance of the Hang Seng Index in Hong Kong and is structured as a classified fund, allowing Chinese investors to invest in Hong Kong equities. As a Qualified Domestic Institutional Investor (QDII), it provides access to overseas markets. It is managed by China Universal Asset Management Co., Ltd., based in China.
